notes: Wrote regex-based Android SDK extractor (Kotlin + Java). Stats: 2369 files (1929 Kotlin, 440 Java), 1381 types, 98 interfaces, 7942 members total. SDK root: Amity-Social-Cloud-SDK-Android/ (sibling of social-plus-docs/). Sample types: AmityBroadcastResolution (enum, 5 members: width/bitrate/SD_480P/HD_720P/FHD_1080P), AmityCoreClient (object, fun setup/registerPushNotification/disconnect/login/...), AmityUserRepository (class, fun getUsers/searchUsers/getUser/...). Design: Kotlin default-public (skip internal/private/protected), Java explicit public. Companion object members tracked with from_companion=true flag (flattened into parent type). Edge cases flagged: global_funcs count (3873) is inflated — the per-line heuristic after annotation-stripping fires on indented class methods too; this is a v1 known limitation and does not affect the types/members surface used by downstream validators. Sealed class hierarchies captured (sealed_class kind). Extension functions not yet modelled (would require multi-file aggregation). Nested types list is present but not populated in v1 (outer class only).
